What to do
Meet with a registered dietitian
In person or by phone.
Talk one-on-one with a registered dietitian to h
elp with chronic disease management, like:
Diabetes
High cholesterol
Malnutrition
Fatty liver
Healthy eating
and other conditions
Ask for a referral
Talk with your primary care doctor about getting a nutrition referral.
View our related free wellness classes and programs.
